text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry about that! Um, would you grant us
a little of your time?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
After our aquarium outing the other day, Meek
and I got to talking about a lot of things, and she
said something that hit me hard.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
"I want to win it all with you. So I'll do everything
I can to make that happen."

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So I think that's why she came up to you all fired
up like that. Do I have that right, Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: You guys are like role models to us.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
And you're rivals, too. Our rivalry pushes us to
grow.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
If we challenge each other, we'll get stronger.
Way stronger, I bet.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm making the first move. I'm here to
challenge you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm on board with Meek and I'll also give it
my all!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I think it'll be good for all of us to compare
training results and stats and such...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So if it's not too much trouble, will you consider
accepting her challenge?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she says, I do believe it would be
beneficial for <chrname> too.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! Isn't that great, Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll do my best.
